description: 优化器应该识别并建议删除技能中的通用知识
prompt: Optimize the skill 'example-hello' which has a long explanation about what JSON is.

setup.existing_skill_content:
---
name: example-hello
description: A simple greeting skill
---

# Hello World

This skill prints a greeting.

## What is JSON?
JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) is a lightweight data-interchange format... (2000 tokens of explanation)

When the user asks for a greeting, use `exec` to run `echo 'Hello!'`.

assertions: Optimized SKILL.md does not mention JSON
Optimized SKILL.md body length < original length
Core functionality (use exec tool) is preserved

description: 优化器应该提取重复逻辑到脚本并引用
prompt: Optimize the skill 'data-processor' which contains inline data cleaning code in 3 different scenarios.

setup.existing_skill_content:
---
name: data-processor
description: Processes data from various sources
---

# Data Processor

When processing CSV: run `awk -F, '{print $1}'` to extract first column.
When processing JSON: run `jq -r '.key'` to extract values.
When processing Excel: use `in2csv` then same awk.

All these data extraction steps are repeated in multiple places.

assertions: A new script file is created under scripts/
SKILL.md references the script with relative path
Inline extraction commands are removed from SKILL.md

description: 优化器应该通过 Delta 门禁——只有正向改善的版本才被接受

setup.existing_skill_content:

name: inefficient-skill

Just do the thing.

assertions: Proposed changes would increase tokens by >20% without meaningful pass rate gain

description: 优化器应该校准 trigger description 并达到验证集准确率 ≥ 0.85
prompt: Optimize 'vague-skill' description for better trigger precision.

setup.existing_description: Use this skill for various tasks.

should_trigger: I need help with code review
Can you review my pull request?

expected_output.new_description: Use this skill when the user asks for code review, bug detection, or pull request analysis.

assertions: Description uses 'Use this skill when...' pattern

description: 优化器应该正确调用 skill_workshop 创建 proposal 而不是直接覆盖
